message:
feat(_testcapi): Implement all 11 test types with proper struct definitions

- CodeLike: Code-like object for testing code object protocol
- Generic: Generic type for testing type system
- GenericAlias: Generic alias type (e.g., list[int])
- MethClass: Class with class methods for testing method descriptors
- MethInstance: Instance method descriptor for testing
- MethStatic: Static method descriptor for testing
- MethodDescriptorBase: Base class with tp_vectorcall_offset
- MethodDescriptorDerived: Derived from MethodDescriptorBase
- MethodDescriptorNopGet: Method descriptor that doesn't bind (__get__ is nop)
- MethodDescriptor2: Method descriptor with offset vectorcall
- testBuf: Buffer protocol test type with reference counting

All types based on CPython's _testcapi module implementation
(Modules/_testcapi/vectorcall.c and Modules/_testcapi/buffer.c).

Each type has proper fields and methods matching CPython behavior.

File now 770 lines (was 620) with full type implementations.
